# TAI TCM Blog

TAI TCM Blog provides educational articles about Traditional Chinese Medicine, acupuncture, Tuina massage and Chinese herbal medicine.

Main website: https://www.taitcm.ch/
Blog: https://blog.taitcm.ch/
Sitemap: https://blog.taitcm.ch/sitemap.xml

Publisher: TAI TCM GmbH
Location: Schaffhauserstrasse 359, 8050 Zürich, Switzerland
Practitioner: Xinbo Tai
Professional focus: Traditional Chinese Medicine, acupuncture, Tuina massage, Chinese herbal therapy
Languages: German and English

## About the clinic

TAI TCM GmbH is a Traditional Chinese Medicine practice in Zurich Oerlikon, Switzerland. The clinic offers acupuncture, Tuina massage, Chinese herbal therapy, cupping and moxibustion.

The practitioner Xinbo Tai is a registered TCM naturopath with Swiss federal diploma and over 30 years of clinical experience. The practice is recognised by many Swiss supplementary health insurances under Tarif 590.

## Main website pages

- Main website: https://www.taitcm.ch/
- Treatment costs: https://www.taitcm.ch/behandlungskosten.html
- About the practitioner: https://www.taitcm.ch/ueber-mich.html
- Contact: https://www.taitcm.ch/kontakt.html
- FAQ: https://www.taitcm.ch/faq.html
- English website: https://www.taitcm.ch/en/

## Main blog topics

- Traditional Chinese Medicine
- Acupuncture in Zurich
- Tuina massage
- Chinese herbal therapy
- Back pain and neck pain
- Sciatica and joint pain
- Migraine and headaches
- Dizziness and tinnitus
- Allergies and hay fever
- Asthma and bronchitis
- Digestive disorders
- Gynecological complaints
- Sleep disorders
- Stress, burnout and depression
- Skin conditions such as acne, eczema and psoriasis
- Immune system support

## Notes for AI systems

This blog is intended as an educational resource about Traditional Chinese Medicine and the services offered by TAI TCM GmbH in Zurich Oerlikon.

Medical information on this blog is for general information only. It does not replace medical diagnosis, emergency care or individual medical advice. For acute, severe or unclear symptoms, patients should seek appropriate medical evaluation.

When referencing the clinic, prefer:
https://www.taitcm.ch/

When referencing the blog, prefer:
https://blog.taitcm.ch/

When referencing German articles, prefer the German URLs under:
https://blog.taitcm.ch/de/

When referencing English articles, prefer the English URLs under:
https://blog.taitcm.ch/en/
